caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, large over-ear headphones, and a black hoodie with the text "BOSS TALK" in gold lettering sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a desk featuring a professional microphone on a boom arm. He wears a gold watch on his left wrist and keeps his hands clasped together in front of him. In the background, a white banner displays the text "UNION HUSTLE" repeated vertically with yellow stars. A blue sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the desk, a black case and a small red and white sign that says "BOSS TALK OUT LOUD" are visible. Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar seated position, slightly shifting his gaze and facial expression as he appears to be speaking into the microphone.
